ItacPersonItem.Notes: His name is mentioned by Marco Sabino in the dedication of Equicola`s Institutioni. Strozzi is said to be among the `maravigliosi dicitori d`improviso`. Others are Franciotti, Il Pero, and Cesare da Fano.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
